data.title: Zep® Expands Home Pro Distribution with Two High-Performance Cleaning Solutions Now Available Nationwide at Walmart
data.description: In Atlanta, Zep®, known for its professional cleaning products, is now offering consumers access to strong cleaning solutions at home. The brand is broadening the availability of two Home Pro products - Zep Home Pro Foaming Miracle Grout Cleaner & Protectant and Zep Home Pro Mold & Mildew Stain Remover. These items can be found nationwide in Walmart's cleaning aisle. They are specifically formulated to combat challenging and stubborn household messes effectively.

data.title: SOLUM Showcases Retail Intelligence, Redefined at Shoptalk Spring 2026
data.description: SOLUM America unveiled its connected shelf technology and integrated digital signage at Shoptalk Spring 2026 in Las Vegas. The event took place from March 24 to 26. The company showcased its innovative solutions for retail customers, emphasizing the seamless connectivity and interactive display features. This presentation was part of the company's ongoing efforts to demonstrate its commitment to cutting-edge technology and enhancing the shopping experience.

data.title: True North Fleet Services Announces New Partnership with Total Tire Solutions, Expanding Platform into South-Central U.S. Market
data.description: In Glen Mills, Pennsylvania, True North Fleet Services has revealed a fresh partnership with Total Tire Solutions in Baton Rouge, Louisiana. This collaboration expands True North's network of fleet maintenance and repair providers, now incorporating Total Tire's commercial repair services. The move signifies True North's strategic expansion into the Southern United States, broadening service offerings to include heavy-duty truck maintenance. This partnership aims to enhance True North's presence in the region, leveraging Total Tire's expertise to drive growth.

data.title: California MBA Testifies at Assembly Banking & Finance Committee Hearing, Calls for Collaborative, Long-Term Natural Disaster Recovery Solutions
data.description: The California Mortgage Bankers Association recently addressed the Assembly Banking & Finance Committee in Sacramento, California, highlighting the impact of mortgage forbearance for individuals affected by wildfires. The testimony focused on the efficacy of offering this assistance to victims of wildfires in the state.

data.title: SFL Missions Inc. to Develop Eight Spacecraft for NASA HelioSwarm Science Mission
data.description: SFL Missions Inc. has recently secured a contract through a competitive bidding process to create eight small satellites for NASA's HelioSwarm science mission. The goal of this initiative is to gather the initial multiscale in situ data on variations in the magnetic field and movements of plasma turbulence within both the solar wind and Earth's magnetosphere. These specialized spacecraft, known as "Node" satellites, are set to be transported to a high-Earth orbit by a larger satellite called the "Hub" after detaching from a commercial carrier.

data.title: Spektrum Unveils Its Trusted Architecture for Cyber Resilience
data.description: In Carmel, Indiana, on March 24, 2026, Spektrum Labs introduced its patented proof-over-promises architecture aimed at bridging the disparity between cybersecurity attestations and tangible resilience. The company, known for its advancement in AI-driven cyber resilience, presented its innovative architecture designed to enhance cybersecurity measures. This unveiling demonstrates Spektrum Labs’ commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions in the realm of cybersecurity, further solidifying its position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: Synchrony to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 21, 2026
data.description: Synchrony, a company listed on NYSE as SYF, is set to announce its first quarter 2026 financial results on April 21, 2026. The earnings release and accompanying materials will be available on the Investor Relations section of the company's website, www.investors.synchrony.com, around 6:00 a.m. Eastern Time. A conference call to review the results is scheduled for 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. The live audio webcast and replay will be accessible on the same website under Events and Presentations.

data.title: Shamrock Technologies extends collaboration with Alithya for next phase of global ERP modernization and AI innovation
data.description: In Montreal on March 24, 2026, Alithya (TSX: ALYA) has revealed an extension of its partnership with Shamrock Technologies, a prominent player in specialty additives production on a global scale. This development comes in the wake of the effective implementation of Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Supply Chain Management.

data.title: APT price aims $1.18 resistance breakout by April 2026. Aptos trades at $1.06 post 11.73% surge. MACD signals weakening momentum.
data.description: The stock of Aptos is currently trading at $1.06 following a significant 11.73% increase in its daily value. Analysts conducting technical analysis predict a potential rise to a resistance level of $1.18. However, caution is advised as the MACD indicator indicates a possible decrease in momentum in the near future.

data.title: Partillion Bioscience Advances a New Era of Cell-Cell Interaction Mapping at the 2026 Cell-Cell Symposium
data.description: In Los Angeles on March 24, 2026, Partillion Bioscience was featured at the 2026 Cell-Cell Symposium at UCLA for its contributions to the advancement of cell-cell interaction mapping. Joe de Rutte, the CEO of Partillion Bioscience, showcased the company's Cell-Cell-seq workflow during the event. This innovation is part of a new era in mapping cell-cell interactions, offering a significant leap in understanding cellular communication. The presentation emphasized the impact of Partillion Bioscience in this field.

data.title: Primrose Schools® Introduces The Primrose Friends Live Through New Creative Collaboration with Dad's Garage Theatre Company
data.description: A new engaging and live performance targeting children will be held from March 14 to April 18 on Saturdays in the wider metro Atlanta region at Dad's Garage Theatre Company. The event is in collaboration with Primrose Schools®, a prominent figure in early education and care. The show promises an interactive experience for young audiences, showcasing learning and entertainment. This initiative marks the latest effort by Primrose Schools® to engage with children, with the event taking place in Atlanta from March 24, 2026.

data.title: FlixBus Reports Strong Early Demand for World Cup Travel
data.description: Excitement is mounting as soccer enthusiasts gear up for multi-city journeys across North America, highlighting the Northeast as a prominent travel route. With the upcoming World Cup set to be the largest in history, preliminary booking information from FlixBus, the continent's rapidly expanding travel network, reveals emerging travel trends.

data.title: KB Home Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on Tuesday, March 24. Analysts are predicting earnings of 54 cents per share, a decrease from $1.49 per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue is $1.09 billion, down from $1.39 billion in the previous year. Recently, Robert McGibney was appointed as president and CEO. KB Home's shares closed at $53.19, marking a 4% increase. For more information on analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga, where data can be sorted by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and other metrics. Explore how Benzinga's top analysts have been rating the company in the latest updates.

data.title: EpiFrontier Therapeutics Secures up to $32M Grant from the Japan Agency for Medical Research and Development to Advance Novel Therapy for Beta Globin Disorders
data.description: Financial backing has been secured to advance the clinical progress of EPF-001, an innovative G9a inhibitor designed for the treatment of sickle cell disease and beta thalassemia. The company, founded on groundbreaking research conducted at RIKEN and Tokyo University of Pharmacy and Life Sciences, has received support from a prominent Japanese venture capital firm. This funding will aid in further developing the drug candidate, which shows promise in addressing these blood disorders affecting millions worldwide.

data.title: Sonepar Sets New Records in 2025 with $37.9 billion Sales and Market Leadership
data.description: The global electrification trend is creating promising prospects for Sonepar, with significant growth observed in pivotal sectors like industrial automation, energy storage, grid modernization, infrastructure upgrades, and the fast-growing data center industry. This surge in electrification is fueling opportunities for Sonepar across various markets worldwide.
